## Feedback

What is unclear, missing, or worth improving?

## Material Boundary

Only discuss synthetic, public, or explicitly cleared materials in this issue.

Do not submit private projects, client work, unreleased roadmaps, internal strategy, private screenshots, private recordings, local workspace paths, or private overlay content.

You may use real projects in your own environment, but do not submit those materials to this public repository.

## Suggested Safe Next Step

- [ ] Synthetic example
- [ ] Public source example
- [ ] Cleared example
- [ ] Documentation clarification only
